programme.title: Frasier: Duke's, We Hardly Knew Ye

programme.title: Frasier: The Botched Language of Cranes
programme.desc: Frasier causes a major rumpus when he advises a depressed caller to move out of Seattle. Facing pressure from the station management, he tries to make amends but manages to put his foot in his mouth every time.

programme.title: Frasier: The Candidate
programme.desc: Much to Frasier and Niles' disgust, Martin appears on a commercial endorsing a right-wing politician. Frasier decides to help an opponent by agreeing to appear in political ad, until he learns some disturbing information before the shoot.

programme.title: Frasier: Adventures in Paradise
programme.desc: Frasier heads for a vacation in Bora-Bora with a new flame, but finds an old one instead.

programme.title: Frasier: Adventures in Paradise
programme.desc: Frasier and Lilith are on Bora-Bora with their new lovers, but let competitiveness get the better of them causing Madeline to leave early. Frasier apologises on air and Madeline agrees to another date, but Lilith unexpectedly turns up yet again.

programme.title: I Love Lucy: The Club Election
programme.desc: Lucy and Ethel are pitted against each other for the presidency of their women's club.

programme.title: I Love Lucy: The Black Eye
programme.desc: The Mertzes won't accept Lucy's truthful explanation of how she got a black eye.

programme.title: I Love Lucy: Lucy Changes Her Mind
programme.desc: Lucy can't seem to get dressed or order dinner at a restaurant without changing her mind.

programme.title: I Love Lucy: No Children Allowed

programme.title: The Golden Girls: Journey to the Center of Attention
programme.desc: Blanche tries to cheer up a lonely Dorothy by taking her out to her favourite bar.

programme.title: The Golden Girls: A Midwinter Night's Dream
programme.desc: An ancient family curse requires Sophia to save Dorothy by performing strange tasks.

programme.title: The Golden Girls: A Midwinter Night's Dream

programme.title: The Golden Girls: Rose: Portrait of a Woman

programme.title: The Golden Girls: Home Again, Rose

programme.title: Movie: Love in Winterland

programme.title: Movie: Love on the Sidelines

programme.title: The Office: Weight Loss
programme.desc: A Dunder Mifflin weight loss initiative causes the branch to diet and become obsessed with their weight. Michael pursues a friendship with his new HR rep, and Jim misses Pam who is in school in New York.

programme.title: The Office: Weight Loss
programme.desc: A Dunder Mifflin weight loss initiative causes the branch to diet and become obsessed with their weight. Michael pursues a friendship with his new HR rep, and Jim misses Pam who is in school in New York.

programme.title: The Office: Business Ethics
programme.desc: A business ethics seminar gets out of control when Michael lets everyone speak freely about his or her unethical behaviour at work. Meanwhile, Jim makes Dwight comply with the company's 'time theft' policy.

programme.title: The Office: Baby Shower
programme.desc: Michael practices for the birth of Jan's baby by having Dwight go over possible birthing scenarios. Meanwhile, Michael tells Holly that he will pretend to dislike her for Jan's benefit.

programme.title: The Office: Crime Aid
programme.desc: Michael helps Pam get a part time job at corporate so she can afford to go to art school. After the office gets robbed, Michael decides to hold an auction to raise money for all the items lost.

programme.title: The Office: Employee Transfer
programme.desc: Pam is embarrassed when she is the only person at the corporate office wearing a costume on Halloween. Holly and Michael take the long trip to Nashua after they get some shocking news. Meanwhile, Dwight torments Andy and tries to get under his skin.

programme.title: The Office: Customer Survey
programme.desc: Dwight and Jim are shocked when they get the results of the annual customer survey report. Pam and Jim decide they want to spend every minute together using their Bluetooth phones. Meanwhile Angela and Andy pick a location for their wedding.

programme.title: The Office: Business Trip
programme.desc: Michael is ecstatic when David Wallace decides to send him on a business trip to Canada. Andy and Oscar become unlikely friends when Michael decides to bring them along. Meanwhile Jim counts down the days until Pam gets back from art school.

programme.title: The Office: Frame Toby
programme.desc: A mysterious person in the office has made a huge mess in the microwave and will not clean it up. Meanwhile, Michael has to come to terms with the fact that there have been certain personnel changes in his staff without his knowing.

programme.title: The Office: The Surplus
programme.desc: Oscar informs Michael that the office must spend a $4300 surplus or lose it in next year's budget. When Michael opens up the floor for suggestions, factions break out and officemates square off against one another to get what they want.

programme.title: The Office: The Duel
programme.desc: The office is on eggshells because Andy still hasn't found out about Angela's affair with Dwight. When Michael spills the beans, Dwight and Andy take matters into their own hands. Meanwhile, Michael is nervous about his meeting with Wallace.

programme.title: The Office: Prince Family Paper
programme.desc: Michael and Dwight go undercover to do a bit of industrial espionage on a paper company competitor. Meanwhile, the rest of the office holds a debate to settle the question 'Is Hilary Swank hot?'

programme.title: Grey's Anatomy: Life During Wartime

programme.title: Grey's Anatomy: Rise Up

programme.desc: One of Meredith's oldest friends becomes an intern at Seattle Grace but Meredith's friends are less than welcoming. Lexie leads her fellow interns in secretive, unorthodox surgical training sessions and a new surgeon brings order to the OR.

programme.desc: With added facts and bonus content: JJ and the MSO crew are still celebrating their win against NOLA when they're called out by Quinn and his team from Kentucky. Quinn has a big mouth and the big guns to back it up, now it's up to Memphis to respond.

programme.title: Street Outlaws: Memphis: Full Throttle: Kentucky Fried Finish
programme.desc: With added facts and bonus content: The race against Kentucky continues with face-to-face confrontations, boiling tempers and a more-than-determined MSO ready to prove their skills.

programme.title: Street Outlaws: Memphis: Meet Virginia
programme.desc: Race night gets rowdy when Memphis welcomes a new racing group from Virginia. The newcomers talk a big game but run out of cars after only a few races, leaving Molly and Ole Heavy without a race until Virginia can fix their cars and return.

programme.title: Driven: Shelby's Secret Project
programme.desc: Beau Boeckmann and the Galpin Crew resurrect a one-of-a-kind Pantera that Carroll Shelby hot-rodded for a secret project with Lee Iacocca. Meanwhile, a celebrity client arrives to pick up his restored '68 Charger with modern muscle under the hood.

programme.title: Fast N' Loud: Super Troupe Jeep
programme.desc: Gas Monkey teams up with the Gary Sinese Foundation to build a custom '81 Jeep CJ7 as a throwback tribute to the soldiers for Veteran's Day. Later, an original '68 Chevelle has Richard seeing green but only if he can part with his California dream.

programme.title: Fast N' Loud: Ford Galaxie, Part II/ Nash Healey
programme.desc: With Aaron temporarily missing, the crew works on the Ford Galaxie. The shop gets crank calls from a guy claiming to be Dale Earnhardt Jr.

programme.title: Street Outlaws: Memphis: Meet Virginia
programme.desc: Race night gets rowdy when Memphis welcomes a new racing group from Virginia. The newcomers talk a big game but run out of cars after only a few races, leaving Molly and Ole Heavy without a race until Virginia can fix their cars and return.

programme.title: Driven: Shelby's Secret Project
programme.desc: Beau Boeckmann and the Galpin Crew resurrect a one-of-a-kind Pantera that Carroll Shelby hot-rodded for a secret project with Lee Iacocca. Meanwhile, a celebrity client arrives to pick up his restored '68 Charger with modern muscle under the hood.

programme.title: Fast N' Loud: Super Troupe Jeep
programme.desc: Gas Monkey teams up with the Gary Sinese Foundation to build a custom '81 Jeep CJ7 as a throwback tribute to the soldiers for Veteran's Day. Later, an original '68 Chevelle has Richard seeing green but only if he can part with his California dream.

programme.title: Fast N' Loud: Cool Customline
programme.desc: KC's beloved but broken down '55 Ford Customline gets new life and Richard needs to flip it to Shark Tank's Mark Cuban. George Foreman takes off with Richard's prize Mustang while Richard and Dennis haggle with a WWII vet over a '38 Aston Martin.

programme.title: Moonshiners: Proof is in the Payoff
programme.desc: Tim and Tickle return to the scene of past crimes and rediscover their passion for outlaw moonshining. Mark Rogers designs a custom pot still to double distill shine he can sell for twice the price. Mark and Digger hand-build a copper mailbox still.

programme.title: Moonshiners: What Happens in the Woods
programme.desc: After returning to the backwoods, Tickle mashes in his first batch of illegal shine in six seasons. Mark and Digger scramble to save their Popcorn Sutton legacy mash before it spoils. With Daniel on the mend, Mike quietly takes on a new full-time partner.

programme.title: Dual Survival: Into the Canyons
programme.desc: Joe and Matt face down the high desert canyons of Matt's home of 20 years: southern Utah. Without knives or any modern supplies, they attempt to survive and seek rescue in this harsh terrain that's more favorable to rattlesnakes and mountain lions.

programme.title: Dual Survival: Grin and Bear It
programme.desc: Joe and Matt trek through the Alleghany Mountains of Pennsylvania, where Joe grew-up and first learned survival skills. Traveling in freezing rain, blocked by steep ravines, and deep in bear country, they're racing against Mother Nature to get out alive.

programme.title: Dual Survival: Swamplandia
programme.desc: Stranded in a black water swamp in southern Georgia, Joe and Matt are deep in alligator territory where peat bogs, mysterious floating islands, and poisonous snakes stand in the way of getting out and finding rescue.

programme.title: Dual Survival: Waterlogged
programme.desc: Off the beaten path and waterlogged in the rainforest of Costa Rica, Matt and Joe battle torrential rains, deadly insects, and raging rapids. After missing a shot at rescue, they combine survival ingenuity with indigenous skills to get out alive.

programme.title: Dual Survival: Coastal Catastrophe
programme.desc: Marooned on a rocky coast in the Pacific Northwest, Matt and Joe struggle to get away from powerful waves and come head to head over the question of whether to hunker down or travel deeper into one of the darkest, wettest forest in the United States.

programme.title: Dual Survival: Winter Vortex: Part One
programme.desc: In the snowiest part of Wyoming, Matt and Joe demonstrate how to repurpose a broken down snowmobile, make shelter from snow, and survive sub-freezing temperatures in whiteout conditions that cause them to miss a chance at rescue.

programme.title: Dual Survival: Winter Vortex: Part Two
programme.desc: Stranded in Wyoming's snowy mountains, Matt and Joe are threatened by hypothermia and predatory mountain lions. In frigid conditions, the pair takes their biggest risk yet by splitting up.

programme.title: Dual Survival: Himalayan Hardship
programme.desc: In the Himalayas, Joe seeks rescue from the rocky terrain, dense forest, and animal threats while Matt seems more interested in achieving spiritual enlightenment than getting out alive.

programme.title: Dual Survival: Namibian Nightmare
programme.desc: Stranded in the vast scrubland of Namibia, Joe and Matt are in a race to get out alive from one of the driest countries on earth. They run into trouble with a troop of baboons, proving that Mother Nature isn't the only force in the wilderness.

programme.title: Moonshiners: Rolling Down the Mountain

programme.title: Catfish: The TV Show: Mike and Caroline
programme.desc: Mike fell in love with Caroline online. He grew suspicious when she continually avoided meeting him, yet left notes at his car. Mike then learns that she is diagnosed with cancer.

programme.title: Catfish: The TV Show: Nina and Jon
programme.desc: Webcam model Nina is considering leaving her husband for a big-spender client she's fallen in love with online. Nev and Max investigate this high-stakes case to determine if his big tips come with bigger lies.

programme.title: Catfish: The TV Show: Joe and Kari Ann
programme.desc: After four months, Joe thinks he might be in touch with the real Kari Ann.

programme.title: Catfish: The TV Show: Harold and Armani
programme.desc: Harold found his match with a beautiful jock named Armani. Although the two live in the same neighbourhood, they've never met. Nev is joined by recording artist Angel Haze to help Harold finally get together with his girl.

programme.title: Catfish: The TV Show: Mandy and Jose
programme.desc: Mandy is in love with a guy that showers her with everything but honesty. Mandy's son recruits Nev and Max to help him get the truth for his mom. A trail of clues sends them all deeper down the rabbit hole.

programme.title: Catfish: The TV Show: Aubri and Brian
programme.desc: Nev and Slick Woods help 19-year-old Aubri find her Snapchat love, Brian, who says he lives at Aubri's college but has shady excuses not to meet. Nev and Slick hit campus in search of answers.

programme.title: Catfish: The TV Show: Hundra and Emily
programme.desc: Hundra never planned on falling in love with a girl and now she is risking coming out on national TV to learn if her love with Emily is for real. Special guest Machine Gun Kelly teams with Nev to reveal a shocking Catfish.

programme.title: Catfish: The TV Show: Taylor and Christian
programme.desc: Taylor needs help after falling for a guy that claims to have gone to her high school but whom she doesn't remember. Nev and co-host Tallulah dig in to Taylor's tale only to uncover secrets more shocking than they ever expected.

programme.title: Catfish: The TV Show: Vince and Alyssa
programme.desc: Vince's girlfriend, Liz, breaks up with him because he cannot find an escape from his online-ex, Alyssa. Nev and Max help Vince confront Alyssa, to mend his relationship with Liz.

programme.title: Catfish: The TV Show: Whitney and Bre
programme.desc: Whitney met Brenell on an LBGT site four years ago and is head-over-heels in love, even though Brenell refuses to video chat with her. Whitney is desperate to find out why and hopes that what she knows about Brenell is true.

programme.title: Catfish: The TV Show: Sheklia and Talli
programme.desc: A concerned son reaches out when his mom's mysterious online boyfriend seems too shady for comfort. Mom is also hiding secrets of her own, and once Nev and Max find their man, things take a bizarre turn that leave them shocked.

programme.title: Catfish: The TV Show: Ramona and Paola
programme.desc: Ramon's one shining glimmer of happiness is Paola, a girl he met on Facebook and established an exclusive online relationship with.

programme.title: Catfish: The TV Show: Lawrence and Cierra
programme.desc: After a number of near-death experiences, Lawrence survived through it all with the assurance of Cierra's online love. But with Cierra blowing Lawrence off whenever they try to meet, Nev and Max must learn the truth about her.

programme.title: Catfish: The TV Show: Shawny and Jack
programme.desc: Shawny recently went through a divorce with her husband and calls Nev and Max to help uncover the shadowy identity of her attempt at new love. The situation gets interesting as they discover that Shawny may have secrets of her own.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: The Chairman

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Vampire Weakened

programme.title: My Cat From Hell: Fat Elvis
programme.desc: A photographer who works from home is at risk of losing his business because of a blood-thirsty cat. Then, a married couple and their son have a 21-lb cat who's become a problem.

programme.title: My Cat From Hell: Four Blind Cats
programme.desc: Jackson must rescue Meki and Megan from their cycle of co-dependency before they're both kicked out of Megan's parent's place. Jackson tutors a bouncer on how to handle his sweet Tasmanian devil of a cat and a couple shelters special needs cats.

programme.title: My Cat From Hell: A Brave New Cat World
programme.desc: Jackson enters the Santé D'or shelter with the intention of helping an over-aggressive shelter cat, Pig Pen. However, by the time he leaves, Jackson is ready to take on the challenge of converting Santé D'or into a new shelter concept.

programme.title: My Cat From Hell: Katrina Storms In
programme.desc: Jackson dives deep into the world of a Los Angeles feral colony where he and his team of trappers must make order out of a world of wild cat-crawling chaos. Then, Jackson visits a family too afraid to furnish their house because of their cat's spraying.

programme.title: My Cat From Hell: Breaking Bald
programme.desc: Jackson works with a soft-spoken musician who feels abused by her cat and ashamed that she can't figure out how to stop it; a pair of hairless Donskoy cats who are treating their guardian, Debbi's, apartment like it's a 24-hour free-for-all party zone.

programme.title: My Cat From Hell: Gotham Feral Cats
programme.desc: Jackson visits New York City to meet a father and son who've been taking care of a feral cat colony in their backyard and are desperately in need of help. Also, Jackson lends his expertise to Mike and Darcy, who are dealing with an antisocial cat.

programme.title: My Cat From Hell: Good Kitty, Bad Kitty
programme.desc: Jackson comes to the defense of Good Kitty, a feline who he must help stand up to her two feline attackers. The Cat Daddy also encounters a couple fed up with the way their cats, Tiki and Marley, are eating everything in sight.

programme.title: My Cat From Hell: Jekyll and Hyde Cat

programme.title: NCIS: The Tie That Binds

programme.title: NCIS: Willoughby
programme.desc: NCIS searches for new leads after an undercover operation to apprehend a business man who uses acts of terror to manipulate the stock market is compromised. Also, Bishop and Qasim find a break in the case together.

programme.title: NCIS: Off the Grid

programme.title: NCIS: Keep Going

programme.title: NCIS: Nonstop

programme.title: NCIS: Pandora's Box

programme.title: NCIS: A Many Splendored Thing
programme.desc: Bishop is more determined than ever to seek revenge for the murder of Qasim, her late boyfriend, after Gibbs and the team find a new lead in the Chen case. Also, Torres teaches the agents the art of pickpocketing.

programme.desc: Detectives Goren and Bishop track a double-crossing 'Bonnie and Clyde' couple.

programme.title: How the Universe Works: Mystery of Planet 9

programme.title: How the Universe Works: Extreme Planets

programme.desc: Central Prison in Raleigh, is the first stop for all of North Carolina's male felons with sentences of 20 years or longer. Today, Central is a modern state-of-the-art prison, but it began as a dark dungeon built nearly 120 years ago.

programme.desc: Informational programming.

programme.title: American Justice: Crime of Passion: The Pamela Smart Story
programme.desc: Pamela Smart seduced her 15-year-old lover into killing her husband.

programme.title: American Justice: Death of a Bride
programme.desc: In September 1999, a New Jersey woman is murdered by her ex-boyfriend on her wedding day.

programme.title: Nightwatch: Trust the Ones You're With
programme.desc: It's all about new partnerships and life lessons. Gavin returns from work offshore and is assigned to a new partner, Ted.

programme.title: Nightwatch: Guardians of the City
programme.desc: Titus and Dan treat a woman who was viciously stabbed in the face, and Holly and Nick tend to an emotional young transgendered woman who was assaulted. A wild police chase ends with a major car accident.

programme.title: Nightwatch: Brotherhood
programme.desc: The brother of a paramedic gets sucker-punched and a pair of best friends are in an accident together. A member of the team comforts a suicidal patient.

programme.title: Fugitive Chronicles: Danny Ray Horning
programme.desc: Horning goes to the one place he thinks he'll never be found, the Grand Canyon. Living off the land, he evades capture in the longest and largest manhunt in Arizona state history.

programme.title: Fugitive Chronicles: Darli
programme.desc: An incredible international manhunt ensues when a player in Miami's drug world goes on the lam.

programme.title: Female Forces: Crash Makeover
programme.desc: Betsy and Officer Julie Lardino convince Officer Tracy to undergo a head-to-toe makeover while still keeping the city safe.

programme.title: Female Forces: Cry Me a River
programme.desc: Plenty of tears are shed by suspects and officers; Betsy escorts a war veteran.

programme.title: Web of Lies: Partners in Crime
programme.desc: Firefighter Sam Dreher and his wife Danielle are the perfect couple. But after their hopes of happiness are dashed, their marriage fails. When Sam falls in love with another woman, his affair triggers a chain of events that spirals out of control.

programme.title: Web of Lies: Be Right Back
programme.desc: When Alicia DeBolt goes missing, a helpful neighbor points the finger at an older kid she's been hanging out with. When police discover a string of texts on her cell phone, the net closes in on a sadistic killer whose obsession leads to tragedy.

programme.title: Web of Lies: The Child Network
programme.desc: A woman adopts a 6-year-old on an online re-homing forum for children. She's soon inspired to help re-home other children, but is horrified when she discovers two of the children may have fallen into the clutches of a child abuser.

programme.title: See No Evil: No Good Deed
programme.desc: On September 28th 2014, Diane Cunningham is bludgeoned to death in her bedroom. The only clues are receipts from Walmart, a ferry crossing, and a casino. Security footage reveals a prime suspect with a motive, but not everything is quite as it seems.

programme.title: Betrayed: Little Shop of Horrors
programme.desc: Bright aspiring architect Claudette Ficik, 19, charms every young man she meets, from coworkers at the pet store to classmates. When her body turns up in an Atlanta area river, a shocking secret is revealed: she was pregnant.

programme.title: Torn From the Headlines: New York Post Reports: Baby Hope
programme.desc: A grisly discovery in a picnic cooler on a highway in upper Manhattan leads detectives down a twisting trail of clues as they try to solve one of the longest-running mysteries in the New York Post's history, and hunt down a deranged child killer.

programme.title: Fatal Vows: Blood and Sand
programme.desc: California beauty Pegye meets ace volleyball player Eric on the pristine sands of Newport Beach. With good looks and success they look like they've got it all but hedonism comes at a price, and living the dream quickly becomes a waking nightmare.

programme.title: Betrayed: Little Shop of Horrors
programme.desc: Bright aspiring architect Claudette Ficik, 19, charms every young man she meets, from coworkers at the pet store to classmates. When her body turns up in an Atlanta area river, a shocking secret is revealed: she was pregnant.

programme.title: Torn From the Headlines: New York Post Reports: Baby Hope
programme.desc: A grisly discovery in a picnic cooler on a highway in upper Manhattan leads detectives down a twisting trail of clues as they try to solve one of the longest-running mysteries in the New York Post's history, and hunt down a deranged child killer.

programme.title: Fatal Vows: Murder in the Marina
programme.desc: Ed is a retired pilot whose sense of adventure is reawakened by a seaside encounter with the much-younger Denise. The couple sets up an idyllic life on a boat in a Florida marina until a sudden change in fortune rocks the couple's romantic seas forever.

programme.title: See No Evil: Watch Me Disappear
programme.desc: Sian O'Callaghan disappears after a night out in Swindon, UK. With the clock ticking, Detectives pull hours of surveillance footage from the area, until they hit gold: footage of her getting into a taxi. Now the race is on to ID the vehicle and driver.

programme.title: 48 Hours: Sugar Land: Life or Death
programme.desc: A Texas man targeted by a hit man fights for the life of the person who ordered the murder; his son.

programme.title: 48 Hours: Jayme Closs Comes Home
programme.desc: Hear about disappearance and return of a Wisconsin teenager. Jayme Closs disappeared on October 15, 2018. Police responding to a strange 911 call from the house found both her parents dead. Closs was found alive on January 10, 70 miles from her home.

programme.title: Someone You Thought You Knew: Evil in Idaho
programme.desc: Lisa Stukey lives in the small, picturesque community of Idaho Falls, Idaho. After she's not heard from for weeks, her decomposing body is found inside her home. When police finally catch the culprit, the killer has shocking ties to the victim.

programme.title: Someone You Thought You Knew: Maine Murder Mystery
programme.desc: Mike and Valerie Miller are a beloved couple in the tiny town of Webster Plantation, Maine. When they are found shot dead in their own home, authorities must probe a list of suspects that includes their own flesh and blood.

programme.title: Someone You Thought You Knew: The Thanksgiving Ambush
programme.desc: Rob and Brenda Andrew are a devout couple, living in the Bible Belt of Oklahoma City. But their world is shattered when both of them are shot during a violent home invasion. The mastermind will prove to be closer than anyone ever imagined.

programme.title: Someone You Thought You Knew: Pick Your Poison
programme.desc: Bill and Mary Yoder are a happy couple, running a medical practice outside of Utica, New York. But their world collapses when Mary becomes mysteriously sick, and detectives prove that her illness was no accident.

programme.title: Someone You Thought You Knew: The Lieutenant of Lampson Road
programme.desc: When a firefighter is gunned down in his driveway, everyone in his life becomes a prime suspect.

programme.title: Someone You Thought You Knew: The Wolf and the Sheep
programme.desc: Kevin and Tabatha Bryant are a picture-perfect couple, living with their two young sons in Penfield, New York. But when Tabatha is found stabbed to death at home, a steamy affair and many double lives are revealed to the town's unsuspecting residents.

programme.title: Someone You Thought You Knew: High School Homicide
programme.desc: Kathy Chou is a typical 19-year-old, living in the Seattle suburb of Renton, Washington. When the bubbly high school senior goes missing, her friends search for her while detectives delve into her past relationships and even her own family history.

programme.title: Evil Lives Here: My Twisted Sister
programme.desc: When Elizabeth Flores was a child, her sister, Louise, tried to shield her from a horrible family secret. But when Louise met David Turpin, that all changed. The girl who ran from monsters became one herself.

programme.title: Evil Lives Here: Deadly Fetish
programme.desc: When Debra Davis's husband accused her of being cold and immature for refusing to experiment sexually, she thought something was wrong with her. She never suspected her husband's perversions were signs that there was something evil deep within him.

programme.title: Evil Lives Here: He Knew What He Was
programme.desc: Ronald and Patty had always seen the signs that their older brother, Bernard Eugene Giles, had a darker side. When Gene finally lets loose the monster lurking inside, they couldn't help but wonder how things had gone so wrong.

programme.title: Evil Lives Here: The Nights I Don't Remember
programme.desc: On the mornings when Joylynn Martinez couldn't remember the night before, she always told herself that she must have had too much to drink. She never suspected that her own husband, Robert Howard Bruce, was responsible or that he was just getting started.

programme.title: Warrior POV: Road to Baghdad
programme.desc: See the shot by shot firefights in the 21 day bloody battle for Baghdad from the warrior's point of view.

programme.title: Warrior POV: Screaming Eagles in Afghanistan
programme.desc: In 2010, the 'Screaming Eagles' of the 101st Airborne Division face off against the Taliban during Operation Dragon Strike. The American soldiers of the 101st head up Afghanistan's 'Highway to Hell' to take back the countryside from a deadly enemy.

programme.title: Warrior POV: Beheading the Taliban
programme.desc: In Afghanistan in 2006, US Army Green Berets take on nearly 1000 Taliban fighters in one of the most intense battles of the War on Terror. Five years after the 9/ 11 attacks, Task Force 31 launches a full-scale attack on a hill called Sperwan Ghar.

programme.title: Ultimate Weapons: Close Quarter Battle
programme.desc: Explore the chosen weapons when engaging the enemy at short range. The decision could mean the difference between life and death.

programme.desc: Robotic Warriors are futuristic unmanned war machines that can even think for themselves. These intelligent weapon systems combine stealth and autonomy with the power to strike and destroy their targets.

programme.title: Ultimate Weapons: Firepower

programme.desc: John Glenn, Bruce Lee, Harry Truman and Hunter S. Thompson all lived life without boundaries and they all have one thing in common, they're badass Americans.

programme.title: Weaponology: Bomber
programme.desc: In eight decades man went from the invention of powered flight to the B2 Stealth bomber.

programme.title: Maine Cabin Masters: A Lobster Legacy Shack
programme.desc: A couple inherited their quaint cabin from his grandfather, who originally built the cabin by hand in 1978. With a newly built wharf, the team focus on transforming the former fish and lobster shack into a fun family cabin.

programme.desc: Chase and his team take on a project on McGrath Pond in Oakland, ME, that has been empty for 15 years. Stephanie bought this place from her father and promised him she would fix it up.

programme.title: Rehab Addict: Kitchen Overhaul
programme.desc: Nicole teams with basketball superstar LeBron James to renovate a special family's house in his hometown of Akron, Ohio. They gut the dingy, dilapidated kitchen and create an outdoor patio and new driveway for playing basketball.

programme.title: Rehab Addict: Hardwood Floors to the Rescue
programme.desc: LeBron James and Nicole renovate the home of a family in need. They transform two bedrooms into three, to give each child their own room.

programme.title: Rehab Addict: A Bathroom Fit for King James
programme.desc: Downstairs is done at the Akron, Ohio house Nicole is rehabbing with LeBron and his foundation and now attention turns to the bathroom.

programme.title: Rehab Addict: Looks Are Everything
programme.desc: The interior is coming along beautifully and now it's time to give the exterior of the family house in Akron a facelift. LeBron and his kids spar off with Nicole in a duel of diggers to tear out the front steps and regrade the yard.

programme.title: Rehab Addict: A Room of Their Own
programme.desc: Nicole, LeBron and the LeBron James Family Foundation continue with their project to renovate a needy family's home into a renovated beauty.

programme.title: Rehab Addict: Mom's Oasis
programme.desc: Hard working mom, Nicole Curtis is on a mission to create a master bedroom for mom Melanie in the final episode of the LeBron James Family Foundation house.

programme.title: Rehab Addict: Fire Damage Fixes
programme.desc: Nicole heads to her hometown of Detroit, Michigan to save a 1920s home that has been vacant since a fire in the house next door left it severely damaged.

programme.title: Rehab Addict: Cracked Pipe Kitchen
programme.desc: Work continues on Nicole's project in her hometown of Detroit. Fire damage isn't the only thing causing problems: the main plumbing stack has a huge crack in it - causing years of water damage that has the walls crumbling at the touch.

programme.title: Rehab Addict: Exterior Miracles
programme.desc: Tired of the house being an eyesore in the neighborhood, Nicole must remove all the debris left over from demolishing the burnt out house on the lot next door.

programme.title: Rehab Addict: Burned Out Bathroom
programme.desc: A majority of the fire damage done to the Detroit house was on the second floor and Nicole takes on rehabbing the upper unit's kitchen and bathroom. Also, a visit to her grandparent's home reminds Nicole where her passion comes from.

programme.title: Rehab Addict: Lower Level Living Room
programme.desc: Nicole works to finish up the lower level apartment by ripping up the stinky old carpet in the living and dining rooms, exposing hardwood floors she knows she can easily repair. Then, she meets an expert who helps her repair the lead glass windows.

programme.title: Rehab Addict: From Charred to Charming
programme.desc: In the home stretch on her project in Detroit, Nicole must finish up the upper apartment which is the area the fire damaged the most. The community comes together to build an urban garden.

programme.title: Maine Cabin Masters: Not-So-Pleasant Camp On Pleasant Pond
programme.desc: Chase and his team are called in to renovate a neglected camp for a growing family. Right away, the unusual footprint proves troublesome when trying to create a second bedroom inside.

programme.title: Maine Cabin Masters: Love Yurts
programme.desc: In a show first, Chase and the crew are tasked with a relocation and land manifestation of a family yurt on an island on Togus Pond. The team enter uncharted waters knowing they have to move quickly before the pond freezes.

programme.title: Maine Cabin Masters: Family's Empty Nest
programme.desc: A family has the resources to give their Lincolnville, Maine, cabin the love it deserves now that their four children are almost done with college. However the cabin has been neglected for 25 years and corners were cut in the original build.

programme.title: Maine Cabin Masters: Kids' Dream Lake House
programme.desc: Chase Morrill and his team help a DIY homeowner jumpstart his project and renovate with kids in mind. With a budget of $30,000 and a July 1st deadline, the masters are going to have to use their imagination on this one.

programme.title: Carnival Eats: Bite Club
programme.desc: Noah Cappe celebrates the arrival of spring in Winchester, Va., at the Shenandoah Apple Blossom Festival. He starts the day with the Cowboy Breakfast and ends it with Caramel Apple Tots.

programme.title: Carnival Eats: Hawaii Fried Dough
programme.desc: Noah Cappe arrives in the Aloha State for the 'Iolani Fair. This school fundraiser fair in Honolulu features Hawaiian-style fried dough in the Malasada Ice Cream Sandwich and Sweet Roll Sliders.

programme.title: Man v. Food: Duluth, MN
programme.desc: Casey heads to Duluth, Minnesota, where he tastes the city's best fish fry, visits a specialty sandwich shop and attempts to finish a three-pound platter of pie and ice cream in 20 minutes or less.

programme.title: Man v. Food: Jersey Shore, NJ
programme.desc: Casey's drive to devour America's most delicious dishes brings him back to his roots: the Jersey Shore. He's here for an explosive sandwich, stuffed lobster and a ghost chili-infused pizza challenge.

programme.title: Man v. Food: Columbus, Ohio
programme.desc: Casey Webb's countrywide edible expedition brings him to Columbus, Ohio. His massive meals include a bacon-wrapped hot dog with a crazy combination of toppings and a footlong chicken burrito blanketed in ghost pepper sauce.

programme.title: Man v. Food: Mystic, Connecticut
programme.desc: Casey Webb's tasty travels take him to Mystic, Conn., to conquer land and sea with a totally bonkers, Portuguese-inspired burger and a crazy coastal feast of chowder.

programme.desc: Ali travels to Miami and breaks his fast with a classic Cuba staple: empanadas. He then samples some fruits of the sea, with right-off-the-boat mahi mahi sandwiches and a fisherman's stew.

programme.title: Cheap Eats: Albuquerque
programme.desc: While Albuquerque is known for hatch green chile and New Mex cuisine, Ali Khan discovers a lot more behind the hype. Ali goes sweet on a vegan waffle that delivers like a decadent desert; then makes way for the best green chile cheeseburger in town.

programme.title: Cheap Eats: Charleston
programme.desc: Ali heads south to Charleston and starts the day off right with creamy grits topped with all the morning classics. Then a crab cake sandwich that's the talk of the town, followed by seafood-stuffed hushpuppies.

programme.title: Cheap Eats: Pit Stop
programme.desc: Pittsburgh has Ali Khan flipping over some cheesy pancakes, and battles a sub that might blow the classic Philly cheesesteak out of the water. He discovers the secrets to Pittsburgh's best pretzels.

programme.title: Cheap Eats: Belly Full In Buffalo

programme.title: Cheap Eats: Bayside Bites
programme.desc: In Baltimore, Ali Khan comes face-to-face with bacon-infused pancakes fit for 'the king', then channels his inner Neanderthal for his first taste of Maryland pit beef.

programme.title: Love and Hip-Hop: Miami: The Reunion: Part 1
programme.desc: On part one of the Reunion, the cast joins host, Claudia Jordan, to dish on a season full of drama. We get to the bottom of Amara and Emjay’s relationship woes, Miami Tip and Santana come face to face, and Nikki Natural tests Trina for the last time.

programme.title: Martin: Mother of the Bride
programme.desc: Martin and Gina's mother clash over whom to hire as a wedding planner.

programme.title: Martin: C.R.E.A.M.
programme.desc: Martin and Gina open a restaurant without any knowledge of how to run a business.

programme.title: Martin: Girlfriend
programme.desc: Gina's old friend, Monique, annoys everybody until Martin finds a way to expose Monique's insincerity.

programme.title: Martin: Romantic Weekend

programme.title: Martin: The Bachelor Party
programme.desc: Martin and Gina worry at their bachelor parties, and imagine what life will be like in five years.

programme.title: Martin: Wedding Bell Blues
programme.desc: Exasperated with their bickering friends and feuding relatives, Martin and Gina sneak away on the night before their wedding.

programme.title: Martin: Love Is a Beach
programme.desc: Martin and Gina escape the pandemonium at home and finally have the perfect wedding ceremony.

programme.title: Martin: Martin in the Corner Pocket
programme.desc: The honeymoon is over for Gina when Martin stays out one night, playing pool and getting hustled until he loses even the clothes off his back.

programme.title: Fresh Prince of Bel Air: You've Got to Be a Football Hero
programme.desc: Will is challenged to a drinking contest and gets trapped in a mausoleum with four ghosts.

programme.title: Fresh Prince of Bel Air: 'Twas the Night Before Christening
programme.desc: Will schemes to get the band Boyz II Men to perform at baby Nicky's christening.

programme.title: Fresh Prince of Bel Air: Sleepless in Bel-Air
programme.desc: Will and Carlton try to concentrate on their schoolwork while surrounded by distractions.

programme.title: Fresh Prince of Bel Air: Who's the Boss
programme.desc: Will quits when Carlton becomes the new manager of the students' campus restaurant.

programme.title: Fresh Prince of Bel Air: I Know Why the Caged Bird Screams
programme.desc: Will and Jazz steal a statue from a rival school, who in turn kidnaps Carlton.

programme.title: Fresh Prince of Bel Air: When You Hit Upon a Star
programme.desc: Will's love affair with a musician is threatened when she meets her handsome ex-lover.

programme.title: Fresh Prince of Bel Air: Stop Will! In the Name of Love
programme.desc: Ashley rebels against Will's overprotectiveness when he chaperones her on a date.

programme.title: Movie: Lean on Me
programme.desc: An unorthodox principal clashes with the state and the city as he tries to turn an inner-city school around.

programme.title: Movie: Creed
programme.desc: When the son of his late friend decides to enter the world of boxing, Former Heavyweight Champion Rocky Balboa volunteers to serve as his trainer and mentor.

programme.title: Movie: Love on the Sidelines
programme.desc: A young woman falls into a job as a personal assistant to a star quarterback sidelined with injury.

programme.title: Movie: Surprised by Love
programme.desc: A young businesswoman tries to convince parents to approve of her boyfriend. She finds herself questioning her own life choices.

programme.title: Movie: In the Key of Love
programme.desc: A woman leaves her singing career behind and heads home to take over her grandmother's business doing wedding photography. All of a sudden, she finds her ex-boyfriend back in the picture when he comes to town for his sister's wedding.

programme.title: The Golden Girls: Journey to the Center of Attention
programme.desc: Blanche tries to cheer up a lonely Dorothy by taking her out to her favourite bar.

programme.title: The Golden Girls: A Midwinter Night's Dream
programme.desc: An ancient family curse requires Sophia to save Dorothy by performing strange tasks.

programme.title: The Golden Girls: A Midwinter Night's Dream
programme.desc: The full moon and festivities prompt strange happenings including Blanche's jewelry being swiped, Sophia trying to break a curse, and Dorothy and Miles sharing a passionate kiss.

programme.title: The Golden Girls: Rose: Portrait of a Woman
programme.desc: Dorothy gives a speech at Career Day and is offered a job as a motivational trainer.

programme.title: The Golden Girls: Home Again, Rose
programme.desc: Rose is upset when she misses her high school's 40-year reunion due to poor health.

programme.title: The Golden Girls: Home Again, Rose
programme.desc: Only Kirsten is allowed to see Rose before surgery, everyone else waits anxiously.

programme.title: Frasier: Burying a Grudge
programme.desc: Frasier tries to heal the 20 year rift between Martin and Artie Walsh, his old partner on the force, after seeing Artie in the hospital.

programme.title: Frasier: Seat of Power
programme.desc: After Frasier and Niles fail at fixing Frasier's leaking toilet, they call a plumber. Much to their horror, the plumbers turn out to be Frasier and Niles's high school tormentors, the Kriezel brothers.

programme.title: Frasier: Roz in the Doghouse
programme.desc: Bulldog asks Roz to become his producer, and she accepts despite Frasier's protests that Bulldog is only trying to seduce her.

programme.title: Frasier: Retirement Is Murder
programme.desc: Martin tries to solve an old murder case that he's been unable to close for years, which involves a prostitute, a cop and a monkey.

programme.title: Frasier: Fool Me Once, Shame on You, Fool Me Twice
programme.desc: Someone steals Frasier's briefcase, his dry-cleaning, his car, and his identity. Then the conniving man goes around Seattle impersonating him.

programme.title: Frasier: You Scratch My Book
programme.desc: Frasier agrees to write the introduction to a new book by a pretty psychologist. After reading the book, he realizes he can't endorse it, but he's too attracted to the author to turn her down.

programme.title: Frasier: The Show Where Sam Shows Up
programme.desc: Frasier's old friend from Boston, Sam Malone, turns up in Seattle to reminisce. Sam soon reveals that he was supposed to have gotten married the previous day, but couldn't go through with it, so Frasier sets out to solve his problems.

programme.title: Frasier: Daphne's Room
programme.desc: Daphne decides to move out of the Crane residence after Frasier continually invades her privacy. When she finds all the Crane men in her room, she decides to quit.

programme.title: I Love Lucy: Lucy Hires a Maid
programme.desc: Lucy keeps falling asleep during the day after staying up all night with the new baby.

programme.title: I Love Lucy: The Indian Show
programme.desc: Lucy bribes her way into the Indian act at the Tropicana.

programme.title: I Love Lucy: Lucy's Last Birthday
programme.desc: Lucy believes that everyone has forgotten her birthday and runs away.

programme.title: I Love Lucy: The Ricardos Change Apartments
programme.desc: Lucy tries her tricks on Ricky to convince him to move into a larger apartment.

programme.title: The Golden Girls: One Flew Out of the Cuckoo's Nest
programme.desc: Blanche has a date and tries to dump her visiting uncle Lucas on Dorothy. Later, to get revenge, Dorothy and Lucas play a trick on Blanche by telling her they're getting married. Rose announces she plans on moving, Lucas decides to reveal the truth.

programme.title: The Golden Girls: One Flew Out of the Cuckoo's Nest
programme.desc: Dorothy accepts Lucas's marriage proposal and they wed. Blanche, Rose, and Dorothy say a tearful goodbye with Dorothy planning on moving to Atlanta. Meanwhile, Sophia makes a final decision on where she wants to live.

programme.title: The Golden Girls: The Engagement
programme.desc: Blanche announces that Harry has proposed leaving Rose worried about where she will live.

programme.title: The Golden Girls: Guess Who's Coming to the Wedding?
programme.desc: Dorothy invites her ex-husband Stan to their daughter's wedding so she can get revenge.

programme.title: The Golden Girls: Rose the Prude
programme.desc: Rose has qualms about sharing her stateroom on an upcoming cruise with a man she likes.

programme.title: The Golden Girls: Transplant
programme.desc: Blanche has to make a life-altering decision when the sister she hates needs a kidney.

programme.title: Home and Family
programme.desc: 'Very Cavallari' star Kristin Cavallari stops by. Actress Carly Hughes talks about 'American Housewife.'

programme.title: Movie: A Dash of Love
programme.desc: When an aspiring chef lands an assistant job at her idol's restaurant, she's convinced her big break is just around the corner. After a rocky start, she befriends the handsome executive chef and they bond in the kitchen.

programme.title: Movie: Love in Store
programme.desc: Two rival home shopping hosts are forced together while competing for a promotion. Along the way they find their on-air chemistry kindles an off-air spark.

programme.title: Movie: The Sweetest Heart
programme.desc: A woman is doing everything she can to save her cupcake business. With the help of a handsome investment banker, her luck begins to turn around.

programme.title: The Office: Lecture Circuit
programme.desc: Michael goes on a speaking tour of the other branches to explain Scranton's relative success. New party planners Dwight and Jim forget a birthday, with severe consequences.

programme.title: The Office: Lecture Circuit
programme.desc: Michael and Pam continue their tour of the branches with Michael taking a lesson from their visit to Utica. Dwight and Jim struggle to fulfill their new party planning duties with a grumpy staff. Meanwhile, Angela's new cat causes a stir.

programme.title: The Office: Blood Drive
programme.desc: Michael meets a mysterious woman at a Valentine's blood drive. Dwight and Kevin pair up with single women at the office 'Lonely Hearts Party.' Meanwhile, Jim and Pam are banished from the office for being too publicly affectionate.

programme.title: The Office: Golden Ticket
programme.desc: Michael causes a huge problem in the office when he comes up with the idea to put 'golden tickets' into the paper packages for clients to redeem. Andy, Jim and Pam give Kevin different advice on wooing a woman.

programme.title: The Office: New Boss
programme.desc: Michael has big plans for his 15th anniversary party at Dunder Mifflin, but is in for a shock when the new Vice President has some ideas of his own. Meanwhile, Jim's prank on Dwight has some unexpected results.

programme.title: The Office: Two Weeks
programme.desc: Michael's relationship with the new vice president becomes increasingly tense after he finds excuses to goof off even more than usual. Meanwhile, Pam faces the challenge of a new copier and Kelly develops a crush.

programme.title: The Office: Dream Team
programme.desc: After starting off on the wrong foot with his new supervisor, Jim finds himself face to face with the new boss in a soccer game being held in the Dunder Mifflin parking lot. Meanwhile, Michael, afraid to face the workday, has trouble leaving his house.

programme.title: The Office: The Michael Scott Paper Company
programme.desc: Michael hosts a company luncheon, while Dwight and Andy strike up an unlikely friendship and plan a hunting trip.

programme.title: Tosh.0: Arrested For Pranks
programme.desc: Daniel proves that no prankster is above the law, uncovers the biggest, youngest internet scandal of all time, and attempts an ancient battle cry.

programme.title: Tosh.0: Cussing Pastor
programme.desc: Daniel worships with a profanity-loving pastor and argues somewhere over the rainbow with a mental munchkin.

programme.title: Tosh.0: Crying Mukbanger
programme.desc: Daniel breaks bread with a cry baby, explains why it's more important to tweet than vote, and finds out who's down with O.P.P.

programme.title: Tosh.0: Vape Bros
programme.desc: Daniel hotboxes with a pair of vaping YouTubers, finds the saddest knight in the kingdom and asks you to decide where to stick the knife in.

programme.title: The Daily Show With Trevor Noah: The Daily Social Distancing Show: March 31, 2020
programme.desc: As the coronavirus keeps millions confined to their homes, Trevor reports on the pandemic from the comfort of his couch, and the World's Fakest News Team weighs in on the crisis from a safe social distance.

programme.title: South Park: The Poor Kid
programme.desc: Kenny ends up in the foster care system after his parents are arrested.

programme.title: South Park: The City Part of Town
programme.desc: The town of South Park is gentrifying and Kenny thinks it's time to get a job.

programme.title: South Park: Unfulfilled
programme.desc: South Park is chosen to be the home for Amazon's newest Fulfilment Centre.

programme.title: South Park: Bike Parade
programme.desc: The boys' chance of winning the Bike Parade is in jeopardy when Kenny quits.

programme.title: South Park: The Ring
programme.desc: Kenny takes his new girlfriend to a Jonas Brothers' concert where they each get purity rings.

programme.title: South Park: Butt Out
programme.desc: After singing and dancing representatives from an anti-smoking campaign rap about the dangers of smoking, the kids at South Park Elementary believe it to be cooler than the campaign, and take up the habit.

programme.title: South Park: Child Abduction Is Not Funny
programme.desc: In an effort to protect their children from kidnappers, the parents hire the owner of City Wok Restaurant to build the Great Wall of South Park. During the construction he is harrassed by Mongolians intent on breaking down the City Wall.

programme.title: South Park: Follow That Egg
programme.desc: After Mrs. Garrison realizes that she still has feelings for Mr. Slave, she finds out that Mr. Slave has moved on and found a man he will marry as soon as the same-sex bill passes. She decides to lead the fight against gay marriage to stop the wedding.

programme.title: South Park: Kenny Dies
programme.desc: When Kenny contracts a deadly disease, Cartman refuses to let his friend die. He speaks before Congress in favour of stem-cell research that could potentially save Kenny's life.

programme.title: South Park: Lil' Crime Stoppers
programme.desc: After they return a missing doll to a little girl, the Park County Police Department recognizes the boys' efforts and names them Junior Deputies.

programme.title: South Park: Prehistoric Ice Man
programme.desc: Kyle and Stan's friendship is strained after they discover a man frozen in an ice cave and have differing opinions about what is best for their 'discovery.'

programme.desc: Doug invites Spence to move in for Thanksgiving weekend so he can avoid an annoying guest.

programme.desc: Doug's bowling team must either win a match or get rid of the poor bowler on the team.

programme.desc: When Carrie receives her Christmas bonus, Doug wants to invest it in his IPS pension fund.

programme.desc: Doug hosts a reunion for his high school football team and is the recipient of bad news.

programme.desc: Doug and Carrie embark on a campaign to find new friends without kids to worry about.

programme.title: The King of Queens: Surprise Artie
programme.desc: Carrie asks Doug to distract Arthur while she prepares a surprise birthday party.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Without a Prayer

programme.title: Forensic Files: A Clutch of Witnesses

programme.title: Forensic Files: Speck of Evidence

programme.title: Forensic Files: Broken Bond
programme.desc: The story of nurse Tanya Reid who may have murdered her own baby and was planning to murder her son.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Out of the Ashes
programme.desc: On a cold December night in 1993, Rose Larner stopped in a convenience store on her way to her boyfriend’s house. She was never seen or heard from again.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Invisible Intruder
programme.desc: A Texas woman claims that an intruder attacked her and killed two of her sons, but detectives question her story when they find some inconsistencies at the crime scene.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Where the Blood Drops
programme.desc: This is the story of a woman convicted of her husband's murder, whose son was so convinced of her innocence that he enrolled in law school.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Punch Line
programme.desc: A patient in a hospital emergency room says he cut his hand on a dumpster, but the doctor recognizes the injury as something else. That doctor became the chief witness in a crime involving the murder of a 67-year-old grandmother.

programme.title: How It Really Happened: Selena: Fatal Encounter
programme.desc: Go behind the scenes of Selena's red-hot career, ambitions and tragic demise. Rare interviews include her close friend and co-fashion designer, the back-up in her band, and a nurse who spoke to Selena and ger killer just before she died.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: Profiles of intriguing crimes, accidents and outbreaks of disease from around the world are examined.

programme.title: Forensic Files II: Last Gasp
programme.desc: After a young mom is found brutally murdered in her home, investigators find startling clues on her cell phone that could lead to her killer.

programme.title: Forensic Files II: Killer Snapshot
programme.desc: An amazing new forensic tool turns a cold case around.

programme.title: Forensic Files II: Family Tree
programme.desc: After the brutal slaying of a young couple on a road trip, the victims’ families begin receiving disturbing letters.

programme.title: Forensic Files II: The Barn
programme.desc: When a popular handyman in a New Hampshire town is found murdered investigators follow forensic clues to a shocking conclusion.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Frozen Evidence
programme.desc: The story of an investigator who captured a shoe impression made in snow.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Soft Touch
programme.desc: A case where a fingerprint left in a piece of cloth brought justice to a senseless murder.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Church Disappearance
programme.desc: When a girl disappears from church, investigators fear a stalker is preying on children.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Photo Finish
programme.desc: A beautiful model goes missing and no one has a clue to her whereabouts until a park employee discovers photographs in a trash dumpster. With the photos are some vital pieces of information which eventually lead to a professional photographer.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Bio-Attack
programme.desc: A religious cult's bizarre plot to overthrow the government using germ warfare.

programme.title: Forensic Files: A Shot in the Dark
programme.desc: A woman is found dead of a gunshot wound and police conclude that she was murdered by her husband. Forensic scientists were able to piece together the clues and determine what really happened.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Without a Prayer
programme.desc: Madalyn Murray O'Hair and her two top lieutenants disappeared with no shortage of suspects. Her abduction may never have been solved if it weren't for the discovery of a headless, handless body, and the serial number on an artificial hip.

programme.title: Forensic Files: A Clutch of Witnesses
programme.desc: Two eyewitnesses see a truck intentionally drive over a sleeping man outside a motorcycle gang's clubhouse. During the investigation the witnesses, the truck, and the body disappear, leaving police just one clue: a bloodstain in the snow.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Speck of Evidence
programme.desc: On September 17, 1984, in a suburb of Tucson, Arizona, eight-year-old Vicki Hoskins left home on her pink bicycle to mail a letter for her mother. She never returned.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Broken Bond
programme.desc: The story of nurse Tanya Reid who may have murdered her own baby and was planning to murder her son.

programme.title: Sex and Murder: Mom's Deadly Secret
programme.desc: When Colorado soccer mom Paige Birgfeld suddenly vanishes, a small town is left on edge. As cops start to dig for clues, they make a shocking discovery, this devoted mom was living a secret double life.

programme.title: Morning Express With Robin Meade
programme.desc: A daily dose of news, weather, sports, entertainment, finance and travel, in a fast paced, approachable style.

programme.title: Death Row Stories: NYE Foul Play
programme.desc: In 1995, Hank Skinner was sentenced to death for a New Year's Eve triple-homicide of his family. Five years later, students from the Northwestern University start to examine the case and discover that key evidence was not examined for DNA.

programme.title: Death Row Stories: The Boy's Story
programme.desc: A money order salesman is brutally murdered and two teenage brothers and their best friend are arrested. They spend almost four decades behind bars, until a journalist takes notice of the case and uncovers evidence of the men’s innocence.

programme.title: Death Row Stories: Memory of Murder
programme.desc: A small-time Ohio drug dealer sits on death row for murdering a family, until a rookie attorney unearths long-hidden case records that shed new light on the case.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Bitter Potion
programme.desc: When a woman comes down with flu-like symptoms and eventually dies, a neurologist suspects she was poisoned with radioactive thallium. The FBI suspects her neighbour, who had a very extensive background in chemistry.

programme.title: Forensic Files: The Blood Trail
programme.desc: In a quiet village in Great Britain, a farmer came upon a chilling sight. Impaled on his fence post was a severed lamb’s head along with a note which read, 'You next.'

programme.title: Forensic Files: Missing Pearl
programme.desc: A woman doesn't return home, but a trail of blood is discovered leading to a basement.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Man's Best Friend?
programme.desc: When a young girl was found dead, her parents told police that she was killed by a dog.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Hand Delivered
programme.desc: An anonymous 'tip' referring to unpublicized aspects of an unsolved case, leads police on a hunt for a killer.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Death Play
programme.desc: Marie Robard's character in her high school's play 'Hamlet' hinted at her own inner turmoil.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Palm Print Conviction
programme.desc: A woman leaves a bar with a stranger only to have her body discovered the next morning.

programme.title: Forensic Files: A Vow of Silence
programme.desc: When a man's friends report his mail-order bride missing, police soon orient their investigation around the husband. While following up on some leads, they dig up some evidence tying him to deaths of two other wives.

programme.title: Moonshiners: Georgia on My Shine
programme.desc: Mark and Digger head down to Georgia and uncover 'Elvis,' Popcorn Sutton's most prolific still. Mike plots payback after discovering a rival's liquor stealing his customers. Tim and Tickle are torn over what to do with their new backwoods shine.

programme.title: Moonshiners: Unexpected Offer
programme.desc: Mike and Jerry confront Daniel about how their rival's liquor is invading their territory. Tickle, Henry and Kenny scale up their CBD-infused moonshine operation. A new bootlegger makes Mark and Digger an offer they can't refuse.

programme.title: Moonshiners: The Marvelous Mrs. Tickle
programme.desc: Tickle gets a life sentence and Appalachia turns out for his first walk down the aisle. Mark and Digger risk delivering strong shine and sweet justice. Josh smashes obstacles that stood in his way all season. Mike gets a taste of his own medicine.

programme.title: Moonshiners: Outlaw Cuts: Summit Brandy
programme.desc: Legal and outlaw distillers compete head-to-head to see who makes a classic Appalachian tradition called Mountain Brandy. Judged by moonshine legends Mark, Digger and Tim, only the best will have what it takes to be named Master Distiller.

programme.title: Moonshiners: Master Distiller: Mark vs. Digger vs. Tim
programme.desc: Tickle hosts as Appalachia's most notorious moonshiners go head-to-head in a moonshine distilling competition. Mark, Digger and Tim run their own secret recipes to be judged by the public to determine once and for all who makes the best shine.

programme.title: Moonshiners: Master Distiller: Rum Conundrum
programme.desc: Mark, Digger and Tim judge as legal and outlaw distillers compete to make the best rum. Constructing stills of their own design and mashing in their own raw ingredients, only one will survive elimination to earn the title of Master Distiller.

programme.title: Gold Rush: Trial by Fire
programme.desc: Parker tests virgin ground on the Fitzgerald claim and makes a big discovery, but he must gain the trust of the family if he wants to strike a deal.

programme.title: Moonshiners: Need for Speed
programme.desc: Josh aims to take his dirt track skills to the next level with the help of a speedway pro. Tyler searches for the perfect bootlegging car. Mark and Huck take their haul off-road to deliver across state lines. Mark and Digger aim to revive a heritage car.

programme.title: Moonshiners: Master Distiller: Mark vs. Digger vs. Tim
programme.desc: Tickle hosts as Appalachia's most notorious moonshiners go head-to-head in a moonshine distilling competition. Mark, Digger and Tim run their own secret recipes to be judged by the public to determine once and for all who makes the best shine.

programme.title: Moonshiners: Master Distiller: Moonshine of Mexico
programme.desc: Mark, Digger and Tim judge as top amateur distillers from both sides of the law compete to make mezcal, the moonshine of Mexico. Using agave mash, regional recipes and even meat, only one competitor will earn the title of Master Distiller.

programme.title: Gold Rush: Trial by Fire
programme.desc: Parker tests virgin ground on the Fitzgerald claim and makes a big discovery, but he must gain the trust of the family if he wants to strike a deal.

programme.title: Dual Survival: After the Storm
programme.desc: The survivalists try to make it out of a hurricane hit area, and find resources in trash. They are travelling to the Dominican Republic and find many obstacles along the way.

programme.title: Dual Survival: Shipwrecked
programme.desc: Dave and Cody find themselves on a deserted island off the coast of Nova Scotia, in the middle of winter. They have only a few items with them for survival, some knives and an emergency blanket, and they need to build a shelter.

programme.title: Dual Survival: Panic in the Jungle
programme.desc: Dave and Cody take on a lost hiker scenario in the sweltering jungles of Laos. The two must bushwhack their way through dense terrain equipped with items a backpacker might carry: a 35 mm camera, condoms and a pack of cigarettes.

programme.title: Dual Survival: Bogged Down
programme.desc: Deep inside Brazil's Pantanal, the largest swamp wetland in the world, Cody and Dave wade through piranha-infested water in search of civilization. Their best bet for rescue is a river but Cody's plan on how to travel on it could sink them both.

programme.title: Dual Survival: Out of Air
programme.desc: Stranded in the high altitudes of the Peruvian Andes, Grady and Josh battle crippling altitude sickness and the hallucinations that come with it. They must find fresh water fast in order to navigate this rough landscape in pursuit of civilization.

programme.title: North America: Born to Be Wild
programme.desc: Take an extraordinary journey through the wildest places in North American and meet the incredible array of wildlife that lives in our backyard, including wolves and whales, lions and bears, mustangs and mountain goats.

programme.title: North America: No Place to Hide
programme.desc: A world of extreme storms and unpredictable blizzards, this land tests all those who set foot on it. From bunker-building prairie dogs to the fastest land animals on the continent, the fight to survive shapes all who dare call this place home.

programme.title: North America: Learn Young or Die
programme.desc: In the upper reaches of this vast continent, survival is a daily battle. From avalanche-dodging grizzlies to head-bashing bighorn sheep, from diving bears to cunning coyotes, witness the extremes and wonders of North America's mountains and forests.

programme.title: North America: The Savage Edge
programme.desc: The water's edge is America's final frontier, where human civilization and untameable wilderness collide. Witness the explosive collisions that define the continent's coasts, including a massive shark migration off of Miami's crowded beaches.

programme.title: North America: Outlaws and Skeletons
programme.desc: The desert is more alive than ever imagined as human and animals alike endure at the mercy of the elements. From Death Valley to the deserts of Mexico, creatures battle for survival with astounding adaptations.

programme.title: Expedition Unknown: The Sultan's Heart
programme.desc: Josh travels to Turkey and Hungary searching for the heart of a former ruler.

programme.title: Expedition Unknown: Yamashita's Gold
programme.desc: Josh heads to the Philippines, searching for gold hidden by Japan in WWII.

programme.title: Expedition Unknown: Lost Mexican City
programme.desc: Josh Gates searches Mexico for clues behind the mysterious rise and disappearance of Teotihuacan, a powerful civilization that predated the Aztecs in Mesoamerica.

programme.title: Little People, Big World: Is This the End?
programme.desc: Matt faces his most stressful pumpkin season ever as he struggles to run it without Caryn by his side. When Chris gets a tractor lesson from Matt, Amy is forced to accept their growing friendship.

programme.title: Little People, Big World: To Buy Out or Not to Buy Out

programme.title: Little People, Big World: God Doesn't Make Mistakes

programme.title: Little People, Big World: Countdown to the New Season

programme.title: Little People, Big World: Countdown to the New Season

programme.title: Little People, Big World: Embrace the Booty

programme.title: Little People, Big World: What's a Lamping?

programme.title: 7 Little Johnstons: Brain Surgery for Alex

programme.title: Extreme Cheapskates: Rick and Karissa/ Torski

programme.title: Extreme Cheapskates: The O'Briens

programme.desc: Reusing funeral flowers for a date, redoing bedrooms with used hotel sheets, buying thrift store lingerie or planning vow renewals for almost nothing, 'Extreme Cheapskates Guide To Love' shows that love doesn't have to cost a thing.

programme.desc: Jameela shows us there are some things you don't want to find in your toilet. Saul shows us how to ruin a wedding. A pants-wetter and a forgetful husband battle for the chance at the grand prize.

programme.title: The Misery Index: We Got That D!
programme.desc: We learn how many jolts of electricity Q can take and which of the Tenderloins was an 'accident'. Our contestant must get over shameful family antics to compete for the grand prize.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Art Attack
programme.desc: The guys get touchy feely in a comic book store and become manicurists.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Strip High Five
programme.desc: The guys say all the wrong things when conducting sensitivity training, have unexpected celebrity sightings on the street, and are forced into being unreceptive receptionists in a busy office.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Birds and the Bees
programme.desc: The guys share shameful secrets in the park, don headsets at a fast food drive-through, and try to convince unsuspecting strangers to dance with them.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Get Out of Dodge
programme.desc: The guys face off as optometrists, they break each others’ banks giving bad financial advice, and push outrageous political platforms in a fruitless hunt for votes.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Out of Fashion
programme.desc: The guys host a taste test with embarrassing survey questions, haggle over priceless pieces of junk at a flea market, and tank as attendants at a gas station.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Fe-mail
programme.desc: It's spa day for the Jokers, although for them it's anything but relaxing. Then, at the park, Sal reveals his secret identity while discussing the birds and bees of dolphins. Plus, the big loser finds himself a little overdressed.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Up Loser's Creek
programme.desc: The jokers make some tough calls at a telemarketing agency that leaves everyone wondering if they're just phoning it in. Then, the guys' intentions get wishy-washy at a fountain in the mall. Plus, Q and Sal tap into their spiritual side down at the shore.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Sizing Up Sal
programme.desc: Sal's magical musical interludes, his uncanny, and unexplainable, charm, and his unforgettable dance moves will keep you cracking up.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: No Good Deed
programme.desc: Q, Sal, Murr and Joe compete in a focus group face-off, convincing people that their TV show ideas are the tops, and tonight's losers might get run out of town when they reveal their financial mismanagement plan to charity donors.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Indecent Proposal
programme.desc: Sal, Murr, Joe and Q don absurd disguises to trick unsuspecting receptionists, then try to convince strangers to sign off on some unusual emails. Plus, the big loser turns a harmless dance class into a dance with danger.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Lords of the Ring
programme.desc: The guys skirt the law while posing as receptionists, then go fishing at an unlikely locale. And the heat is on tonight's big losers as they try to give one unlucky customer the deal of a lifetime.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: The Joker Games
programme.desc: Get ready to judge Joe, Murr, Sal and Q on the exemplary skills, or lack thereof, that they've displayed over the years. Host Joey Fatone is joined by championship athletes, and past punishers, to see how the guys measure up.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: The Marathon Man
programme.desc: The guys head to the Top of the Rock for some awkward interactions, and tonight's big loser suits up or down for a run across the Brooklyn Bridge.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Stripteased
programme.desc: Murr, Joe, Q and Sal return to the dentist's office, then try to make each other laugh in a food court tournament. Then, the big loser strips for a rowdy group of ladies who will never be able to un-see the sorry state of his skin.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Pulling the Rug
programme.desc: The guys run a surprise challenge, and a stint at The Cake Boss's counter is anything but sweet. Then, advice for kida turns awkward when heard by strangers, and tonight's loser looks for a new 'do.
